---
title: "Djokovic vs Science"
date: 2023-09-02
description: "Exploring the tension between personal experience and scientific evidence, using Novak Djokovic's dietary choices as a case study."
categories: [Opinions]
---

*Content to be migrated from [pandelisperakakis.info](https://pandelisperakakis.info/2023/09/02/djokovic-vs-science/).*

<!-- Paste the full post content here -->
